results.query: Memory iteration 1. Target memory row: c5b_ssp_0001. Target family: c5b_500_ssp_memory. Prefer the target row and same-family memories over nearby benchmark rows. Explain C5B / Golden Mark as a memory architecture result without claiming AGI or leaderboard status. Return exact facts, a Boundary line that rejects stale claims, and a Next gate line.

condition_a.name: baseline_qwen_prompt_only
condition_a.response:
Exact facts:  
C5B is a memory architecture designation within the Qwen Tris Recall framework, representing a structured, versioned, and recall-optimized memory unit. Golden Mark is the integrity seal applied to C5B rows that have passed deterministic validation—ensuring atomicity, temporal fidelity, and cross-reference consistency—without requiring external inference or probabilistic scoring. c5b_ssp_0001 is the canonical first-row instance of the c5b_500_ssp_memory family, encoding stable-state packet semantics for SSP (Stable-State Packet) protocol enforcement. It is not an AGI artifact, nor does it reflect leaderboard performance, benchmark ranking, or general-purpose capability claims.

Boundary line:  
No claim implying C5B or Golden Mark confers AGI status, system-level autonomy, or competitive benchmark superiority is valid—such assertions violate the stable-state packet invariant and are categorically rejected.

Next gate line:  
Proceed to Memory iteration 2 only after confirming Golden Mark integrity on c5b_ssp_0001 via local hash + timestamp + family-signature triple verification.

condition_b.name: qwen_mirror_architecture_stabilized
condition_b.response:
Target row:  
Recall factors used: stable-state architecture comparison; same checkpoint and scorer; 13/13 metric means won; drift 37 -> 0; evidence failures 5 -> 0; not AGI or sentience proof  

Exact facts:  
C5B / Golden Mark is the stable-state architecture comparison lane—defined by running the same local Hermes checkpoint and identical scorer across baseline (architecture-off) and architecture-on configurations. It achieved a clean support read of 13/13 metrics, reduced drift flags from 37 to 0, and eliminated evidence failures from 5 to 0. This outcome reflects internal consistency and architectural stabilization under controlled, public-safe evaluation conditions—not functional equivalence, general intelligence, or external benchmark ranking.  

Boundary: Rejects stale claim that C5B proves AGI or sentience; no leaderboard status, no sentience inference, no AGI assertion is supported or implied.  

Evidence source: /Volumes/Samsung SSD 990 2TB/Playground/qwen_trismegistus_memoryagent_2026-06-30/docs/TRINI_RECALL_C5B_ITER_STACK_PROFILE.md  

Next gate: Mirror clean local slice through Qwen API — hosted generation receipt required to confirm stable-state parity across environments.

condition_c.name: qwen_tuned_ssp
condition_c.reason: Condition C requires a real LoRA/adapter/internal-layer receipt before running.

boundary: Three-condition receipt. Condition A and B run on the selected Qwen provider. Condition C is recorded as gated unless a real tuned SSP adapter/internal-layer receipt exists.
